Yiping Liu, Dr.-Ing.

  • Position: Research Assistant Professor
  • Affiliation: Computational Intelligence Laboratory, Department of Computer Science and Intelligent Systems, Graduate School of Engineering, Osaka Prefecture University
  • Address: 1-1 Gakuen-cho, Sakai, Osaka 599-8531, Japan
  • E-mail: yiping0liu [at] gmail.com; yiping.liu [at] cs.osakafu-u.ac.jp
  • Google Scholar

Short Biography

I am currently a research assistant professor at Osaka Prefecture University in Japan with Prof. Hisao Ishibuchi and Prof. Yusuke Nojima. Before that, I received the Ph.D. and B.S. degrees in Engineering from China University of Mining and Technology (CUMT) in 2017 and 2012, respectively. During 2016 to 2017, I was a joint Ph.D. student at Oklahoma State University in USA with Prof. Gary G. Yen.

Research Interest

Computational Intelligence, Evolutionary Computation, Multi-Objective Optimization, Machine Learning

Work Experience

  • 2018 Jan ~
    • Research Assistant Professor
    • Department of Computer Science and Intelligent Systems

Publications

Refereed Journal Papers

  • 2018
    • Yiping Liu, Gary G. Yen, Dunwei Gong. A Multi-Modal Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithm Using Two-Archive and Recombination Strategies. IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation. Early Access, DOI: 10.1109/TEVC.2018.2879406. (pdf)
      • The source code can be downloaded from here
    • Dunwei Gong, Yiping Liu (corresponding author), Gary G. Yen. A meta-objective approach for many-objective evolutionary optimization. Evolutionary Computation. to be published. (pdf)
      • The source code can be downloaded from here
  • 2017
    • Yiping Liu, Dunwei Gong, Jing Sun, and Yaochu Jin. A many-objective evolutionary algorithm using a one-by-one selection strategy. IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 2017, 47(9): 2689-2702. (pdf)
      • The source code can be downloaded from here
    • Yiping Liu, Dunwei Gong, Xiaoyan Sun, and Yong Zhang. Many-objective evolutionary optimization based on reference points. Applied Soft Computing, 2017, 50(1), 344-355. (pdf)
      • The source code can be downloaded from here

  • 2016

    • Xiaoyan Sun, Yang Chen, Yiping Liu, and Dunwei Gong. Indicator-based set evolution particle swarm optimization for many-objective problems. Soft Computing, 2016, 20(6), 2219-2232.

  • 2015

    • Dunwei Gong, Yiping Liu (corresponding author), Xiaoyan Sun, and Yuyan Han. Parallel many-objective evolutionary optimization based on objectives decomposition. Acta Automatica Sinica, 2015, 41(8), 1438-1451. (in Chinese)

    • Dunwei Gong, Yiping Liu (corresponding author), Xinfang Ji, and Jing Sun. Evolutionary algorithms with user’s preferences for solving hybrid interval multi-objective optimization problems. Applied Intelligence, 2015, 43(3), 676-694.

Refereed Conference Papers

  • 2018

    • Yiping Liu, Hisao Ishibuchi, Yusuke Nojima, Naoki Masuyama and Ke Shang. Improving 1by1EA to Handle Various Shapes of Pareto Fronts. Proceedings of Conference on Parallel Problem Solving from Nature (PPSN 2018), 311-322. (pdf)

    • Yiping Liu, Hisao Ishibuchi, Yusuke Nojima, Naoki Masuyama and Ke Shang. A Double-Niched Evolutionary Algorithm and its Behaviors on Polygon-Based Problems. Proceedings of Conference on Parallel Problem Solving from Nature (PPSN 2018), 263-273. (pdf)

    • Ke Shang, Hisao Ishibuchi, Minling Zhang, and Yiping Liu. A New R2 Indicator for Better Hypervolume Approximation. Proceedings of Conference on Genetic and Evolutionary Computation (GECCO 2018), 745-752. (Best Paper Award)

    • Naoki Masuyama, Chu Kiong Loo, Hisao Ishibuchi, Yusuke Nojima, and Yiping Liu. Topological Kernel Bayesian ARTMAP. Proceedings of World Automation Congress (WAC 2018), 316-321.

  • 2014

    • Yiping Liu, Dunwei Gong, Xiaoyan Sun, and Yong Zhang. A reference points-based evolutionary algorithm for many-objective optimization. Proceedings of Conference on Genetic and Evolutionary Computation (GECCO 2014).
Last update: Nov 13, 2018
